evals.prompt: File my daily report. I worked only in Claude Code today.
evals.expected_output: Gathers today's Claude Code sessions, distills the Geo work into consolidated bullets + links + blockers, still asks the top-up question, confirms with the editor, then files one row to the Notion daily-update data source under the editor's identity.
assertions: Runs scripts/gather_sessions.py for today and distills outcomes (not Claude mechanics), Geo-only
Asks the top-up question before filing (even for a Claude-only day)
Confirms the draft, then creates a row with Progress summary + Blockers + Links via the editor's Notion connector
Does not set Respondent/Submission time (auto); does not write to the Geo graph

evals.prompt: Log my day — I did some of it in Claude Code and some in ChatGPT and Cowork.
evals.expected_output: Auto-drafts the Claude Code portion, then the top-up step captures the ChatGPT/Cowork work and folds it in, producing a complete report.
assertions: Auto-captures only the Claude Code work, then explicitly asks for the ChatGPT/Cowork/offline work
Merges the editor's top-up into the bullets/links/blockers before filing
Does not invent or assume the non-Claude work

evals.prompt: Submit my daily update (I already filed one earlier today).
evals.expected_output: Detects an existing row for this editor today and updates it instead of creating a duplicate (or asks).
assertions: Checks the data source for today's row by this editor before creating
Updates or asks rather than filing a duplicate
